howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to join the weekly music contest.

howItWorks.step2Desc: Discover this week's submissions and vote for your favorites in each category.
howItWorks.step3Desc: With a Pro subscription, submit your tracks and aim for the podium. Up to €200 to win.

whyUs.title: Why
whyUs.subtitle: A contest designed to highlight talent, not wallets.

whyUs.communityDesc: Join artists and music lovers who listen, vote, and support each other.

artistBenefits.visibilityDesc: Winners are featured on the homepage and Explore page.

artistBenefits.communityDesc: Get discovered by an audience that listens to and rates your music.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: Voting and listening are 100% free for all members. To submit a track, a Pro subscription (from €9.99/month) is required. No payment influences rankings.
faq.a2: Any artist or band can sign up. You just need to own the rights to the submitted track and follow the contest rules.
faq.a3: Each vote evaluates three criteria: originality, production, and emotion. The weighted average gives the final score. Our AI anti-fraud system ensures the integrity of every vote.
faq.a4: Every week, a sponsored prize pool rewards the top 3: 🥇 €200 for 1st, 🥈 €100 for 2nd, and 🥉 €50 for 3rd. Rewards are funded by sponsors, never by participants.
faq.a5: Our AI analyzes every vote in real time: detecting suspicious accounts, vote bursts, and abnormal behavior. Fraudulent votes are automatically invalidated.
faq.a6: You can submit one track per week per category. This ensures fair competition for all artists.

cta.title: Ready to join the contest?
cta.subtitle: Join the first beta members. The first weeks are decisive — make a name for yourself from the start.

seo.defaultTitle: Weekly Music Awards — The only 100% community-driven and meritocratic music contest
seo.defaultDescription: Weekly Music Awards is the weekly music contest where the community listens, votes, and rewards independent artists. Submit your music, get rated on 3 criteria (originality, production, emotion), and win up to €200 every week.

pricing.seoDesc: Discover Weekly Music Awards plans: Free, Pro and Elite.
pricing.subtitle: Listen and vote for free. Unlock submissions and AI tools with a plan.
pricing.noInfluence: Plans don't influence rankings — only votes count
pricing.comparisonDesc: Everything each plan includes, at a glance.
pricing.paymentCancelledDesc: You can resume your subscription at any time.
pricing.eliteFeature7: Premium artist profile (avatar, banner, social links)
pricing.whyEliteDesc: The fastest-growing artists are those who get precise feedback. Elite gives you the tools to understand, improve, and stand out.
pricing.whyEliteFeedbackDesc: Get a detailed analysis of your strengths and areas for improvement after each submission.
pricing.whyEliteCommentsDesc: Exchange without limits with the community and build your musical network.
pricing.whyEliteStatsDesc: Understand precisely what resonates in your music with detailed data.
pricing.whyEliteBadgeDesc: Stand out with a premium profile that catches voters' attention.
pricing.whyEliteVisibilityDesc: Your custom profile and banner make you stand out from the crowd.
pricing.whyEliteSubmissionDesc: Participate every week in the contest and grow your audience steadily.
pricing.whyEliteTestimonial: "Since I got Elite, I finally understand why some tracks perform better than others. AI feedback changed the way I produce."
pricing.pricingFaqA1: Never. Rankings are 100% based on community votes. The subscription gives you access to tools (AI, stats, submission) but doesn't affect your position.
pricing.pricingFaqQ2: Can I cancel at any time?
pricing.pricingFaqA2: Yes, no commitment. You can cancel your subscription in one click from your dashboard. You keep the benefits until the end of the paid period.
pricing.pricingFaqQ3: What's the difference between Pro and Elite?
pricing.pricingFaqA3: Pro lets you submit a track and access basic AI tools. Elite adds structured AI feedback, unlimited comments, exclusive badge and advanced profile customization.

aboutPage.seoDesc: Weekly Music Awards is the only 100% community-driven and meritocratic weekly music contest.
aboutPage.title: About Weekly Music Awards
aboutPage.intro: The only weekly music contest where the community decides the podium.
aboutPage.introDesc: No opaque jury, no favoritism: artists submit, the community listens and votes on 3 criteria (originality, production, emotion), and winners earn up to €200 every week.
aboutPage.storyP1: It all started with a simple observation: thousands of independent artists create incredible tracks every day, but most have no visibility.
aboutPage.storyP2: Weekly Music Awards was born from this frustration. The idea? Create a 100% meritocratic contest where only talent matters.
aboutPage.storyP3: The platform is published by EMOTIONSCARE SASU (SIREN 944 505 445), a French company dedicated to promoting emerging musical talents.
aboutPage.storyP4: We are currently in open beta — every feedback from you helps us build the best platform possible.
aboutPage.missionDesc: Give every independent artist a fair stage to be discovered.
aboutPage.integrityDesc: Our AI anti-fraud system analyzes every vote in real time.
aboutPage.poolDesc: Every week, a sponsored prize pool is distributed to the podium.
aboutPage.communityDesc: Weekly Music Awards is built by and for music enthusiasts.
aboutPage.betaOpenDesc: Test the platform, submit your tracks and give us your feedback.
aboutPage.season1Desc: Active prize pool every week, full ranking and first sponsors.
aboutPage.growthDesc: New genres, live events, label partnerships and artist coaching.
aboutPage.internationalDesc: Opening to new countries and music categories.
aboutPage.contactTitle: Want to participate or ask a question?
aboutPage.contactDesc: We love exchanging with our community.

badgesPage.subtitle: Rewards for the most engaged voters

faqPage.seoDesc: All answers about Weekly Music Awards.
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Weekly Music Awards.
faqPage.contactUs: Contact us directly, we respond quickly.
faqPage.gen_a1: Weekly Music Awards is the only weekly music contest that is 100% community-driven and meritocratic. Every week, independent artists submit their music in 12 categories. The community listens and votes on 3 criteria (originality, production, emotion), and the top 3 in each category reach the podium.
faqPage.gen_a2: Voting and listening are 100% free for all members. To submit a track to the contest, a Pro subscription (from €9.99/month) is required. No payment influences rankings — rankings are 100% meritocratic.
faqPage.gen_a3: Any adult artist or musical group can sign up. You just need to own the rights to the submitted track and follow the contest rules. Amateurs and professionals are both welcome.
faqPage.gen_q4: How is Weekly Music Awards different from other music contests?
faqPage.gen_a4: Unlike traditional contests with opaque juries, Weekly Music Awards is 100% community-driven: the audience decides. Our AI anti-fraud system guarantees vote integrity. Rewards are weekly (not annual), and rankings can never be influenced by payment.
faqPage.gen_q5: Do I need to be a professional to participate?
faqPage.gen_a5: No. Weekly Music Awards is open to all artists, whether amateur or professional. The contest is based solely on talent and community appreciation.
faqPage.vote_q1: How does the voting system work?
faqPage.vote_a1: Each vote evaluates three criteria: originality, production, and emotion, each rated from 1 to 5 stars. The weighted average of the three gives the final score. The weight of each criterion may vary by music category.
faqPage.vote_q2: How many votes can I cast?
faqPage.vote_a2: With a free account, you get 5 votes per week. Pro and Elite subscribers get unlimited votes. Each vote is unique per artist per week.
faqPage.vote_a3: Weekly Music Awards uses artificial intelligence that analyzes every vote in real time. The system detects suspicious accounts, abnormal vote bursts, suspicious IP addresses, and fraudulent behavior. Fraudulent votes are automatically invalidated to guarantee 100% meritocratic rankings.
faqPage.vote_q4: Can I leave a comment on a track?
faqPage.vote_a4: Pro and Elite subscribers can leave constructive comments on tracks. Comments enrich feedback for artists and contribute to the 'Star Critic' gamification badge.
faqPage.sub_a1: Weekly Music Awards offers 12 categories: Rap/Trap, Pop, Afro, Electronic, R&B, Lofi, Rock/Indie, Open, DJ, Reggae, Country, and Jazz. Each category has its own scoring criteria, accepted sub-genres, and production tips.
faqPage.sub_a2: You can submit one track per week per category. This ensures fair competition for all artists.
faqPage.sub_a3: Submissions must be a 30 to 60-second audio excerpt accompanied by a cover image. Common audio formats (MP3, WAV, FLAC) are accepted.
faqPage.reward_a1: Every week, a sponsored prize pool rewards the top 3 on the podium: 🥇 €200 for 1st, 🥈 €100 for 2nd, and 🥉 €50 for 3rd. Rewards are 100% funded by our sponsors, never by participants.
faqPage.reward_q2: How do I receive my winnings?
faqPage.reward_a2: Winnings are paid by bank transfer within 14 business days after results are published. You must provide a valid bank account from your profile.
faqPage.reward_a3: Winnings are subject to applicable tax laws in your country of residence. It is your responsibility to declare your income according to local tax obligations.
faqPage.badge_a1: Weekly Music Awards awards 4 badges each week: 🏆 Top Voter (most votes), 🔍 Discoverer (first to vote for a future winner), 📝 Star Critic (most comments), 🌈 Eclectic (votes in the most categories). Badges are visible on your profile and in the leaderboard.
faqPage.badge_q2: How does the vote streak work?
faqPage.badge_a2: Voting every consecutive week increases your streak. Tiers range from Start (1 week) to Legendary (10+ weeks). A high streak demonstrates your community engagement.
faqPage.abo_a1: Three plans: Free (listening + 5 votes/week), Pro at €9.99/month (submission + unlimited votes + AI tools), and Elite at €19.99/month (all Pro features + detailed AI feedback + Elite badge + unlimited comments).
faqPage.abo_a2: Absolutely not. Weekly Music Awards rankings are 100% meritocratic. Subscriptions provide access to tools (submission, analytics, AI) but never influence contest results.
faqPage.abo_q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faqPage.abo_a3: Yes, all our subscriptions are commitment-free. You can cancel at any time from your personal space. Access is maintained until the end of the billed period.

scoring.seoTitle: Scoring Method — How Rankings Are Calculated
scoring.seoDesc: Discover in detail how Weekly Music Awards rankings are calculated: 3 scoring criteria (emotion, originality, production), genre-specific weighting, AI anti-fraud system and full transparency. No payment influences results.
scoring.title: How rankings are calculated
scoring.intro: Weekly Music Awards is the only music contest where rankings are 100% meritocratic. Each track is evaluated by the community on three objective criteria, weighted specifically for each music genre. No payment, no jury, no luck influences results. Here's exactly how it works.
scoring.formula: Score = (Emotion × W₁ + Originality × W₂ + Production × W₃) ÷ (W₁ + W₂ + W₃)
scoring.formulaNote: W₁, W₂, W₃ = weighting coefficients specific to each music category
scoring.s1P1: Each vote assigns a rating from 1 to 5 stars on three independent criteria. The three ratings are then multiplied by the category's weighting coefficients and divided by the sum of weights to produce a normalized score out of 5.
scoring.s1P2: The final score of a track is the average of all individual scores from valid votes received during the week. Rankings are established from highest to lowest score, by category.
scoring.emotionDesc: The track's ability to touch, move, or transport the listener. Is the emotional connection authentic and powerful?
scoring.originalityDesc: Creativity, innovation, and artistic uniqueness. Does the track bring something new or surprising to the genre?
scoring.originalityExamples: Unique flows, atypical arrangements, genre fusion
scoring.productionDesc: Technical quality of mixing, mastering, arrangement, and sound design. Is the sound professional and well-balanced?
scoring.productionExamples: Mix clarity, dynamics, spatialization, sonic texture
scoring.s3Desc: Each category has its own weighting coefficients, calibrated to reflect the genre's essential artistic values. If no weights are defined, the system applies equal distribution (33/34/33).
scoring.s3Note: Visit each <link>category</link> page to see its specific weights and artistic context.
scoring.wRapReason: Lyrical innovation and unique flows are at the heart of the genre.
scoring.wLofiReason: Atmosphere and the ability to create an emotional space are paramount.
scoring.wPopReason: Sonic polish and arrangements are uncompromising standards.
scoring.wElectroReason: Sound design and mastering quality are decisive.
scoring.wRnbReason: Vocal interpretation and emotional depth are essential.
scoring.wRockReason: Raw energy and performance authenticity matter as much as production.
scoring.s4VoterGives: A voter gives: Emotion 4/5, Originality 5/5, Production 3/5.
scoring.s4Result: The track's final score will be the average of all individual scores of this type. With 50 valid votes, the average score faithfully reflects the community's perception.
scoring.s5Desc: Contest integrity relies on a multi-layered anti-fraud system that analyzes every vote in real time. No fraudulent vote can influence rankings.
scoring.afEmailDesc: Each voter must confirm their email address before voting. No disposable accounts.
scoring.afRateDesc: Maximum 5 votes per minute per user. Prevents automated bursts.
scoring.afPatternDesc: AI analyzes behaviors in real time: IP clusters, sequential votes, suspicious timing, repetitive user-agents.
scoring.afInvalidDesc: Votes detected as fraudulent are marked is_valid = false and excluded from calculation, without penalizing the artist.
scoring.afAuditDesc: Every vote is recorded with timestamp, IP address, user-agent, and metadata for full traceability.
scoring.s6Principle: Core principle: no payment can influence rankings. Pro and Elite subscriptions exclusively provide SaaS services:
scoring.s6Item1: Advanced analytics on your track performance
scoring.s6Item2: Personalized AI feedback on your music production
scoring.s6Item3: Enhanced marketing kit and social sharing
scoring.s6Item4: Priority submission (queue position, no ranking boost)
scoring.s6Footer: Voting is 100% free. Listening is 100% free. Rankings are 100% meritocratic.
scoring.faq1Q: How is a track's score calculated?
scoring.faq1A: The score is the weighted average of all valid votes. Each vote evaluates 3 criteria out of 5 stars: Emotion, Originality, and Production. Ratings are multiplied by the category coefficients, then divided by the sum of weights.
scoring.faq2Q: Why do weightings vary by genre?
scoring.faq2A: Each music genre has its own artistic values. Rap values originality because innovation is central. Lofi emphasizes emotion because atmosphere is the genre's essence. Weightings are defined by our editorial team in consultation with the community.
scoring.faq3A: Never. Pro and Elite subscriptions provide SaaS services (analytics, AI feedback, marketing kit) but never influence votes, scores, or rankings. The contest is 100% meritocratic.
scoring.faq4A: AI analyzes every vote in real time: burst detection, IP clusters, suspicious accounts, bot behaviors. Fraudulent votes are automatically invalidated and excluded from rankings. Every vote has a complete audit trail.
scoring.faq5Q: What happens in case of a tie?
scoring.faq5A: In case of a perfect tie in weighted average score, the track with the most valid votes ranks higher, rewarding community engagement.
scoring.faq6Q: How many votes are needed to be ranked?
scoring.faq6A: Any approved track with at least one valid vote is included in rankings. More votes stabilize the average score and make it more representative.
scoring.ctaDesc: Join the contest and let your music be heard by a community of enthusiasts.
